title: Comparing Tradesperson Quotes
instruction: Complete the comparison of two quotes.
passage: Plumber A: £50 per hour, estimated ___ hours. Quote: £150 total. Plumber B: ___ rate of £120. Plumber A might cost more if the job takes ___ than 3 hours. Plumber B is better if the job is ___. Plumber A is cheaper if the job takes ___ than 2 hours 24 minutes.
